raw_text:
Jordan Lee
jordan.lee@example.com | +1 (512) 555-0192 | linkedin.com/in/jordanlee-dev | github.com/jordanlee-dev

Professional Summary
Software engineer with 5 years of experience building web applications using Python, JavaScript, and cloud services. Familiar with agile methodologies and collaborative development environments.

Work Experience

DataFlow Systems — Software Engineer
Austin, TX | Mar 2021 – Present
- Built REST APIs for internal data processing pipelines
- Worked with the team to migrate services to Docker containers
- Helped maintain PostgreSQL databases for production systems

WebCraft Studio — Junior Software Developer
Remote | Jun 2019 – Feb 2021
- Developed features for a Django-based SaaS platform
- Wrote unit tests and helped improve code coverage
- Assisted with onboarding new team members

Technical Skills
Python, JavaScript, React, SQL, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, REST APIs, Agile

Education
University of Texas at Austin — B.S. Computer Science
Aug 2015 – May 2019

Projects
Job Board Aggregator (2022)
Personal project to aggregate and search software engineering job listings
- Built a job board aggregator that scrapes listings from multiple sites
- Added a search feature using basic keyword matching
